title: Router and gateway are authorized independently, so approvals can be combined with an unrelated whitelisted call target
reason: Exploitability depends on external whitelisted routers exposing arbitrary forwarding or multicall behavior; the scoped code alone does not establish a concrete permissionless abuse path.

title: Configured min/max token limits are dead code and never enforced at the entrypoints
reason: The mappings are indeed unused, but the demonstrated effect is mainly operator misconfiguration and policy drift; the scoped code does not show a concrete theft, permanent lockup, or permissionless DoS outcome.
